name: Nihilism
tagline: There is no inherent meaning, value, or purpose. Now what?
summary: Nihilism is the recognition that traditional sources of meaning — gods, essences, cosmic purpose — do not hold up under honest examination. It is less a doctrine than a confrontation: what kind of life can be built once the comforting stories fall away?

quotes.text: There are no facts, only interpretations.
quotes.author: Friedrich Nietzsche

quotes.text: God is dead, and we have killed him.
quotes.author: Friedrich Nietzsche

quotes.text: It is not worth the bother of killing yourself.
quotes.author: Emil Cioran

quotes.text: Life has no meaning the moment you lose the illusion.
quotes.author: Emil Cioran
